Function.Inference: Introductory section establishing the mood before the segno.
Main loop body starting at the segno and ending with a D.S.

Section.Inference: Intro with a rhythmic ostinato motif.
First presentation of the primary melody (Theme A).
Contrasting B section with long arpeggiated chords.
Return of Theme A with variations in the second half.
Theme C utilizing the intro motif to transition back to the segno.
